---
title: "Git for Everyone"
subtitle: "An Introduction to Version Control and GitHub"

output-file: index

format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: c/t
    embed-resources: true
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto
    history: false
    highlight-style: a11y
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: false
    logo: 
    theme: [dark, custom.scss]
revealjs-plugins:
  - attribution

authors:
  - name: Jared Frazier
    orcid: 0000-0001-8221-7972
    affiliations:
      - ref: iap
affiliations:
  - id: iap
    name: Leibniz Institute of Atmospheric Physics 

date: "2026-03-18"
# bibliography: references.bib
---
